message: 🌱 Add helm: app-name has no deployed releases mission (#507)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-5595-app-name-has-no-deployed-releases",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: app-name has no deployed releases",
+    "description": "app-name has no deployed releases. Requested by 94+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current helm deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your helm version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm\nhelm list -n helm 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working helm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant helm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm\nkubectl get configmap -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=helm\n```\n**Output of `helm version`:**\n```\n$ helm version \nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\", GitCommit:\"618447cbf203d147601b4b9bd7f8c37a5d39fbb4\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\nServer: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\","
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for app-name has no deployed releases",
+        "description": "The code in place was originally correct. Removing `status: deployed` from the query results with Helm finding the latest release to upgrade from, regardless of the state it is currently in which could lead to unintended results. It circumvents the problem temporarily, but it introduces much bigger\n```yaml\n$ helm version \r\nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\", GitCommit:\"618447cbf203d147601b4b9bd7f8c37a5d39fbb4\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\r\nServer: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\", GitCommit:\"618447cbf203d147601b4b9bd7f8c37a5d39fbb4\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade helm to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade helm:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade helm helm/helm --namespace helm\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n helm\nhelm list -n helm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm\nkubectl get events -n helm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"app-name has no deployed releases\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The code in place was originally correct. Removing `status: deployed` from the query results with Helm finding the latest release to upgrade from, regardless of the state it is currently in which could lead to unintended results. It circumvents the problem temporarily, but it introduces much bigger issues further down the road.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ helm version \r\nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\", GitCommit:\"618447cbf203d147601b4b9bd7f8c37a5d39fbb4\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\r\nServer: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.13.1\", GitCommit:\"618447cbf203d147601b4b9bd7f8c37a5d39fbb4\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}",
+        "$ kubectl version \r\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"14\", GitVersion:\"v1.14.0\", GitCommit:\"641856db18352033a0d96dbc99153fa3b27298e5\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-03-25T15:53:57Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.12.1\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\r\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"10\", GitVersion:\"v1.10.11\", GitCommit:\"637c7e288581ee40ab4ca210618a89a555b6e7e9\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-11-26T14:25:46Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.3\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}",
+        "spec:\r\n  revisionHistoryLimit: 1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
